stemHtml:
Given the following tropical cyclone advisory information, which of the following statements is correct?

MOV: SLW
C: 990 HPA
MAX WIND: 30KT
FCST PSN +6 HR: 12/1800Z N3200 E13955
FCST MAX WIND +6 HR: 40 KT
FCST PSN +12 HR: 13/0000Z N3235 E13925
FCST MAX WIND +12 HR: 40 KT
FCST PSN +18 HR: 13/0060Z N3310 E13855
FCST MAX WIND +12 HR: 40 KT
FCST PSN +24 HR: 13/0012Z N3345 E13825
FCST MAX WIND +12 HR: 40 KT
RMK: NIL
NXT MSG: 20180812/1800Z=

options.a: The tropical cyclone moves at a speed lower than 3 kt and the atmospheric pressure of its centre is 990 hPa.
options.b: The tropical cyclone is expected to have wind speeds higher than 80 kt in the next 12 hours.
options.c: The tropical cyclone moves at a speed lower than 3 kt and the max wind speed is 40 kt.
options.d: The tropical cyclone is already weakening and this is the last advisory message.
